ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (q:Question {title: 'How to build a 360-degree view in Neo4j?'})-[r1:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: 'neojp'}),
    p2 = (u:User {uuid: 12345})-[r2:ASKED]->(q),
    p3 = (q)-[r3:ANSWERED]->(a:Answer {is_accepted: true})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: How does the accepted answer to the question about building a 360-degree view in Neo4j relate to the tag "neojp" and which users have contributed most significantly to discussions around it?

cypher:
MATCH (q:Question {title: "building a 360-degree view in Neo4j"})<-[:ANSWERED]-(a:Answer {is_accepted: true}) -[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: "neojp"})
MATCH (u:User)-[:COMMENTED]->(c:Comment)-[:COMMENTED_ON]->(q)
RETURN q.link AS question_link, a.link AS accepted_answer_link, t.name AS tag_name, u.display_name AS user_name, c.score AS comment_score
ORDER BY c.score DESC
